Event: Ghost Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 27/01/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AR223
Chain Rider Plate Mail

Once in a while, the unit removes all freeze and stiffness effects and sets all enemies in a large radius around the unit on fire every second for 4 sec. The burning enemies take 130000 magic damage and have their healing rate reduced by 15% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. The armor wearer restores health equal to 15% of the damage dealt by the ability.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Ghost Treasure Hunt

Event date: 27/01/2025

Sage bot code: AR223

First trigger: 5 sec

Cooldown: 9 secs
